creator: PopularMoment@protonmail.com
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #1)

> Does the port work with Go 1.21?  If yes, it might be better to use Go 1.21 instead of 1.19.

No, certificate renewal currently fails on anything >1.19.

The only available workaround is to use 1.19.

> Also if there is already an issue open against your port and the update fixes that, there's no need to open a new issue.  For now, I'll deal with you having two issues for the same thing.

This also updates to the latest commit which importantly fixes a security issue, which is entirely unrelated so the certificate renewal problem.
